name: JetBrains
description: A leading software company specializing in intelligent development tools for programmers and teams.
longDescription: JetBrains is a global software company founded in 2000, headquartered in Prague, Czech Republic, and registered as JetBrains s.r.o. under Czech law. Renowned for its suite of intelligent development tools, including integrated development environments (IDEs) like IntelliJ IDEA, PyCharm, and WebStorm, JetBrains also created the Kotlin programming language, widely used in Android development. Serving over 11.4 million developers worldwide, the company offers both free and commercial editions of its tools, catering to individual developers, startups, and enterprises. With additional offices in Germany and other regions, JetBrains is committed to enhancing developer productivity and fostering innovation, maintaining a strong focus on data protection and compliance with GDPR and SOC 2 Type II standards.
features: Support for web and mobile development
Database tools for SQL and NoSQL
